dogs.name: Golden Retriver
dogs.description: Intelligent, gentle, and incredibly loyal, often used as therapy and family dogs.

dogs.name: French Bulldog
dogs.description: Small, affectionate, and highly adaptable, making them perfect for city living.

dogs.name: Labrador Retriver
dogs.description: Known for being friendly, outgoing, and the ultimate family companion.

dogs.name: German Shepherd
dogs.description: Highly intelligent, courageous, and versatile working dogs.

dogs.name: Poodle
dogs.description: Elegant and highly intelligent dogs that come in toy, miniature, and standard sizes.

dogs.name: Dachshund
dogs.description: Playful and courageous dogs with a distinctive long body and short legs.

dogs.name: Beagle
dogs.description: A merry and curious hound with an excellent sense of smell.

dogs.name: Rottweiler
dogs.description: Confident and protective guardians with a calm disposition.

dogs.name: German Shorthaired Pointer
dogs.description: Energetic and eager to please, excellent for active owners.

dogs.name: Pembroke Welsh Corgi
dogs.description: Clever, affectionate, and outgoing herding dogs with short legs.

dogs.name: Australian Shepherd
dogs.description: Highly energetic and intelligent dogs that thrive in active households.

dogs.name: Yorkshire Terrier
dogs.description: A tiny, feisty, and affectionate toy breed with a beautiful floor-length coat.

dogs.name: Boxer
dogs.description: Exuberant, playful, and loyal dogs known for their energetic nature.

dogs.name: Cavalier King Charles Spaniel
dogs.description: Graceful, affectionate, and lap-warming companions.

dogs.name: Doberman Pinscher
dogs.description: Fearless, incredibly smart, and loyal watchdogs.

dogs.name: Siberian Husky
dogs.description: Medium-sized, athletic working sled dog originally bred for endurance in the freezing Arctic

dogs.name: Great Dane
dogs.description: Often called the 'Apollo of dogs', they are sweet-natured, patient, and loyal companions that make excellent family pets despite their intimidating stature.

dogs.name: Shih Tzu
dogs.description: Affectionate and outgoing 'lion dogs' originally bred to be royal companions.

dogs.name: Miniature Schnauzer
dogs.description: A spirited, intelligent, and adaptable companion known for its iconic bushy beard, expressive eyebrows, and wiry coat.

dogs.name: Boston Terrier
dogs.description: A lively, compact, and affectionate companion affectionately known as 'The American Gentleman' due to its tuxedo-like coat.
